subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Lord! Verily, this servant, enkindled with the fire of Thy love and attracted to the kingdom of Thy mercy, hath desired to [3.5s]... ...As to the Obligatory Prayer, it hath a Qiblih that is fixed, specified, holy and blessed
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک الملتهب بنار محبتک المنجذب الی ملکوت رحمانیتک قد احب ان
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @law of obligatory prayer
